description:
Microsoft Word 2010 is open with a legal memorandum titled 'Recoverability of Consequential Damages'. Replace the placeholder markers [FN1], [FN2], [FN3], and [FN4] in the document body with proper footnotes containing the following citations:

- [FN1]: Hadley v. Baxendale, 9 Ex. 341, 156 Eng. Rep. 145 (1854).
- [FN2]: U.C.C. § 2-715(2)(a) (2002).
- [FN3]: Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 351 (1981).
- [FN4]: Sullivan v. O'Connor, 363 Mass. 579, 296 N.E.2d 183 (1973).

Save the document after completing the replacements.
